codeSystems.name: BeMedicationExposureIntentVS
codeSystems.title: Medication exposure intent
codeSystems.description: The exposure purpose of a medication - whether the medication is given for therapeutic or prophylactic purposes.

codeSystems.name: BeMedicationLineAdherenceStatusReasonVS
codeSystems.title: Medication Treatment Status Change Reason
codeSystems.description: Reasons for changes in the medication treatment status.

codeSystems.name: BeMedicationLineAdherenceStatusVS
codeSystems.title: Medication line adherence status value set
codeSystems.description: Medication line adherence status value set

codeSystems.name: BeMedicationLineRegistrationStatusVS
codeSystems.title: Medication Line Registration Status Value Set
codeSystems.description: This value set includes the registration statuses for medication lines.

codeSystems.name: BeMedicationLineStatusVS
codeSystems.title: Medication Statement Status Codes
codeSystems.description: This value set includes a selection of medication statement status codes from FHIR.

codeSystems.name: BeMedicationRequestReimbursementTypeVS
codeSystems.title: Medication request reimbursement type ValueSet
codeSystems.description: Medication request reimbursement type - instructions for reimbursement of the medication request

codeSystems.name: BeRouteOfAdministrationVS
codeSystems.title: Route of Administration ValueSet
codeSystems.description: This ValueSet contains codes for the route of administration of medications. It is used to specify how a medication is administered to a patient, such as orally, intravenously, or topically.
